name: Chocolate Vinegar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt together into a mixing bowl.
2. Make three wells in the dry ingredients. Pour vanilla into one well, vinegar into another, and melted butter into the third.
3. Pour water over all the wells. Beat with a wooden spoon until well blended.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F. oven for 25 minutes or until cake tests done.
6. Cool in pan on rack.
7. Frost with Mocha Chocolate Frosting.
8. Cut into squares.
Mocha chocolate frosting:
1. Combine confectioners' sugar, cocoa, softened butter, coffee, and vanilla in a mixing bowl.
2. Beat with an electric mixer set at medium speed until smooth.
